name: 6 Layer Toffee Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour three 8-inch cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, margarine, buttermilk, cocoa, baking soda, vanilla, salt, and eggs. Beat on low speed until just mixed, scraping sides with a spatula.
4. Add coffee to the mixture.
5. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pans.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool cakes in the pans on wire racks for 10 minutes.
9. Remove from pans and cool completely on racks.
10. While cakes are cooling, chop Heath bars and reserve two-thirds for later use.
11. In a small bowl, dissolve half a teaspoon of instant coffee with one teaspoon of hot water.
12. Cool mixture.
13. With a serrated knife, cut each cooled cake into two thin layers, making six total layers.
14. In a large bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Add brown sugar and the cooled coffee mixture, beating until well combined.
15. Assemble the cake by placing one layer on a serving plate. Spread with half a cup of whipped cream.
16. Sprinkle with one-fifth of the reserved Heath bars.
17. Repeat layers four more times.
18. Top with the last layer of cake.
19. Thinly spread whipped cream over the top and sides of the cake.
20. Gently press the remaining reserved Heath bars onto the top and sides of the cake.
21. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
